subject: docs: log trigger sweep process violation in AI_MISTAKES
body:
Documented mistake of batching all trigger fixes instead of pausing
after each trigger for user review. The process requires explicit
fix/skip/stop between each trigger, regardless of user instruction.

Tags: documentation, process
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: hardening-sweep
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01D1vPh85VCNSPwbxHLjFtAF
